story.intro: You awaken in the observation deck of the ISS Meridian, a deep-space research vessel. The lights flicker. Instruments display impossible readings. The last log entry warns of a presence in the ship—something that was never supposed to wake up. You have 60 minutes before the life support systems fail.
story.outro: The final frequency aligns. The entity's anchor to this dimension weakens. As it dissipates into the void, the ship's systems surge back online. Alarms silence. You've severed its link and bought humanity another day. The Meridian drifts safely back toward home.

puzzles.prompt: The communication array screen shows corrupted text—fragments of a technician's final transmission before the haunting began. Decode the message to understand what awakened the entity. The coded text reads: "JU TUZ CGQK ZNK YRKKVKX"
hints: The message uses a simple letter-shift cipher — every letter has moved the same number of steps in the alphabet.
Try shifting each letter backward by 6 positions.
Shifting each letter back by 6 reveals: "DO NOT WAKE THE SLEEPER".

puzzles.prompt: The entity manifest pulses with text that reads: 'I am not alive, yet I consume. I have no form, yet I touch. I was born from nothing, yet I hunger for all. The more you fear me, the stronger I grow. I exist in every ship, every station, every void. What am I?'
hints: It thrives on fear and emotion.
It can exist anywhere in space, in any darkness.
It is the absence of something, not the presence of anything.

puzzles.prompt: The celestial map shows a sequence of harmonic frequencies emitted by the entity's anchor point across dimensional barriers. The visible readings are: 2, 6, 12, 20, 30, ?. Solve the sequence to find the next frequency needed to destabilize its hold.
hints: Each step increases by a growing amount.
The differences between consecutive numbers form their own pattern: 4, 6, 8, 10...
The next difference will be 12, so 30 + 12 = ?

puzzles.prompt: The core logic unit displays a chamber resonance puzzle: The entity anchors itself to this dimension via three quantum cores in separate sections. Core A vibrates at 8 Hz. Core B at 5 Hz. Core C at 3 Hz. To sever the connection, you must input the sum of all vibrational frequencies across the entire ship. If each section has 4 cores, and each core oscillates at twice its section's primary frequency, what is the total sum of all 12 cores' frequencies?
hints: Each core in a section vibrates at double its section's listed frequency.
Section A: 4 cores at 16 Hz each. Section B: 4 cores at 10 Hz each. Section C: 4 cores at 6 Hz each.
